title: Enrich Custom IOCs - Dataminr Pulse
content:
This playbook will enrich the Dataminr Pulse ReGenAI Incident's IOCs using custom reputation commands.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Dataminr pack (DataminrPulse, partner-supported).

Use cases: Network Security, Threat Intelligence Management, Breach Notification, Malware, Phishing, Ransomware, Vulnerability Management.

Inputs — vulnerability_indicators: List of Vulnerability indicators.; malware_indicators: List of Malware indicators.; threat_actors_indicators: List of threat actor indicators..

Integrations/scripts used: Exists, Print, dataminrpulse-malware-enrich, dataminrpulse-threat-actor-enrich, dataminrpulse-vulnerability-enrich.

      brand: ""

      "yes":

    scriptarguments:

                iscontext: true
              right:
                value:
                  simple: Dataminr Pulse ReGenAI
